name: product_showcase_video
description: Transform a product image into a 5-second showcase video using Kling 3.0 image-to-video. Upload your product photo and get a professional animated product video. Pro quality mode.

image_url.description: Product image URL (required — the image to animate)

prompt.description: Optional styling direction (e.g. 'rotate slowly on white background', 'zoom in with sparkle effects')
